runTitle: Vercel targeted QA - assistant response process detail visibility
coveredSurfaces: dashboard AI sidebar opens on production
AI query returns assistant response on production
analysis basis badge renders on production
skippedSurfaces: AI workspace fullscreen parity beyond badge visibility

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after production deploy; billed 0.0000 USD with no unexpected spike.

pendingImprovements.title: Production AI responses should expose response-process metadata when analysis basis is shown
pendingImprovements.note: On deployment dpl_7dnNfhff4zsTg7xE99HjzJ2mWGWc, the badge expands but only shows data/engine; Trace ID, handoff history, and tool result summaries are absent in production responses.

notes: Production deploy verified via Vercel deployment dpl_7dnNfhff4zsTg7xE99HjzJ2mWGWc for commit c772507f6273661c48d3069d788d6e9e52b715f4.
Dashboard AI sidebar path reproduced the issue more reliably than fullscreen AI workspace.
Two production queries were tested: overall server summary and cache-redis-dc1-01 memory trend analysis.
Both responses rendered the analysis basis badge, but expanded content only showed data source and engine without response-process metadata.
